[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100010101 4
1 110100001 4
2 110101010 5
3 011001101 5
4 010011000 3
5 010111011 6
6 100010101 4
7 110100001 4

12 21 000000100 1

67 76 010001100 3
70 07 000010100 2

02 20 100010100 3
13 31 000100000 1
24 42 100000000 1
35 53 010000001 2
46 64 110101000 4
57 75 011001101 5 match 3
60 06 100100100 3
71 17 001000100 2
